title: Social Media Calendar
description: Build a customizable social media content calendar system with AI and NocoBase. Connect coding agents like Claude Code, Cursor, or OpenCode to NocoBase and use natural language to generate post composing, multi-channel previews, a publishing status kanban, and a scheduling calendar. Not just a prototype — a customizable, reliable social media operations system you can keep iterating on.
description_cn: 使用 AI 和 NocoBase 搭建可定制的社交媒体内容日历管理系统。将 Claude Code、Cursor、OpenCode 等 Coding Agent 接入 NocoBase 后，可用自然语言生成帖子撰写、多渠道预览、发布状态看板、定时排程日历等功能。不只是生成原型，而是构建可定制、可靠、可长期迭代的社交媒体运营系统。
author: NocoBase Team
prompt: Build a NocoBase app — Social Media Calendar: a post composer with a live phone preview and a scheduling calendar. Match the layout and signature visuals of this reference prototype: https://static-docs.nocobase.com/solution/templates/04-social-media-calendar.html
